Blaauw Port

System / Location · First seen 3301-08-20 · 1 mentions
Active: 3301-08-20 → 3301-08-20
System Overview

Blaauw Port is a starport in the Elite Dangerous universe, significant from 3301-08-20 to 3301-08-20. Associated with Emperor's Dawn. The mysterious organisation Emperor's Dawn has issued open contracts for commodities to be delivered to specific starports. Battle Weapons go to Saarinen Station in Kamcha, Ceremonial Heike Tea to Sikorsky Orbital in Jang Di, and Toxic Waste to Blaauw Port in Dinkas.

Mentions Timeline (1 articles)
3301-08-20
Commodities needed in the Kamcha, Dinkas and Jang Di Systems
The mysterious organisation Emperor's Dawn has issued open contracts for commodities to be delivered to specific starports. Battle Weapons go to Saarinen Station in Kamcha, Ceremonial Heike Tea to Sikorsky Orbital in Jang Di, and Toxic Waste to Blaauw Port in Dinkas. Based in the Kamcha system, Emperor's Dawn appears to have considerable resources and is offering lucrative payments to participating traders.
